examples: She is devious and sly and manipulative.
Newman was certainly devious, prepared to say one thing in print and something quite different in private.
He followed the pageant through all its devious windings about London, and all the way to Westminster and the Abbey.
It's only a matter of time before someone uses the BubbleBoy's means to devious ends.
Conservationists say timber and plantation companies often use devious methods to obtain rights on tribal lands.
